descriptions: Different level numbers throughout
Coin count and level number differ from reference
The level progress and values do not match the reference state.
Game board positioned differently
Marble board is shown flat/frontal and larger, overlapping the level path nodes, instead of tilted and positioned above the path

The game board and level nodes are incorrectly positioned, rotated, and overlapping. In the reference, the board is tilted (rotated) and sits above the levels string. In ours, the board is straight, overlapping with level nodes 7 and 8 which shouldn't even be visible for this level setup.
Status bar elements added
System status bar elements are visible at the top of ours but hidden in the reference.
Different marble patterns on game board
Status bar with time and battery icon visible at top in ours but not in reference
Game board configuration is completely different
Ball puzzle layout differs significantly - different number, positions and colors of balls on the board
The placement of game pieces (marbles and shooters) on the board is completely different, indicating a mismatch in the level or board state.
Coin count value differs
Coin value differs between screenshots
The coin count value at the bottom left is different.
Top dispenser ball color swapped
The blue buttons (health bar, settings, coin counter) have different border/shadow shading.
Status bar visible in ours but not in reference
The top of the screen contains device status bar elements (time, wifi, battery) which are not present in the clean mockup.
Card background color is different
Background pattern differs
The settings modal background color and surrounding frame style are completely different.
Settings title text color is different
Overall color scheme differs significantly
The settings list item container background colors are cream/peach instead of light blue/white.
Settings title text styling is different
Title text style and casing differ
Font families, weight, colors, and letter casing differ significantly across all texts (Settings, list items, buttons).
Decorative header banner is missing
The orange ribbon banner header and close (X) button are missing
Reset progress text capitalization differs
Reset Progress text styling differs
Coin counter UI element is missing
Coin balance indicator ('75' with coin icon) at top right is missing
The top-right coin balance display is completely missing in our version.
Reward amount is different
Reward value formatting differs, missing '+' prefix and styled font
Missing 'LEVEL 4' label above 'COMPLETED', and missing 'REWARD' text indicator.
Extra Replay button added
Extra 'Replay' text and coin decorations appear below the Next button, not present in reference
An extra 'Replay' text button is present at the very bottom of the card.
Dialog card positioning is different
Next button is inside the card panel instead of below it as a separate floating button
The 'Next' button is incorrectly positioned inside the main modal instead of being a large floating button underneath it.
NEXT button text styling differs
'Next' button text case and font differ from reference
The font style for the 'NEXT' button text is a generic sans-serif instead of the stylized, rounded bubble-like font.
Crying emoji is completely missing
Missing 'LEVEL 4' label and sad emoji illustration
The sad emoji illustration is missing.
Different message text
Different message text and button labels
The description text and 'Level 4' badge are incorrect or missing.
Quit option added
Extra 'Quit' text option not present in reference
Dialog position different
Background settings UI elements are bleeding through/visible underneath the dialog card.

verdict.summary: FAIL — panel median 40% · 0 pass, 5 fail, 1 unscored (floor 85%)
